title: SCENTORINI Fresh Linen Reed Diffuser Refill Oil 200ml – Crisp Clean Scent Refill for Reed Diffusers – Airy Fresh Aroma for Bathroom, Wardrobe, Office & Everyday Home Use
features: Refreshing Linen Fragrance - Evoke the crisp freshness of sun-dried laundry and just-aired sheets. This revitalizing aroma brings a breath of clean air into your home, perfect for morning routines or tidy spaces
Generous 200ml Refill Size - Get weeks of continuous fragrance with just one bottle. Ideal for daily use, this diffuser oil refill revitalizes your living space with subtle yet long-lasting scent
Effortless DIY Compatibility - Pour directly into your favorite reed diffuser bottle—works with most brands and styles. Great for refilling existing fragrance setups with your personal touch
Ideal for Light & Airy Spaces - The linen aroma naturally suits bathrooms, closets, entryways, and laundry rooms, offering a sense of calm and cleanliness with every breath
Compact & Spill-Free Design - Plastic packaging ensures easy storage and mess-free application. Take it with you or gift it—an elegant fragrance solution with zero fuss
